name: Globus Transfer Dataset
summary: Stage large datasets with Globus transfer and verification steps.
description: This skill provides a Globus CLI workflow for checking endpoints, submitting recursive transfers, and recording task ids for reliable HPC data movement.

inputs.name: source_collection
inputs.description: Globus source collection id or name.

inputs.name: destination_collection
inputs.description: Globus destination collection id or name.

inputs.name: paths
inputs.description: Source and destination paths to transfer.

outputs.name: transfer_task_id
outputs.description: Globus task id for tracking transfer status.

examples.title: Submit and watch a Globus transfer

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example script.
Run globus endpoint local-id or globus collection show, then submit a small test transfer.
